design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Control the Planeteers and Captain Planet to fight environmental villains and save the planet

progression.unlock_mechanism: Likely stage-based progression tied to defeating environmental villains

world_building_techniques: Licensed IP from Captain Planet animated series provides narrative context
Environmental themes tied to game premise

environmental_storytelling: Thematic alignment with Captain Planet animated series eco-warrior narrative

data_limitations: Source material (The Cutting Room Floor) focuses on development trivia and unused assets rather than comprehensive game design documentation. Critical design details regarding difficulty systems, core mechanics, progression structure, boss patterns, and gameplay loops are not documented in available source. This represents T3 tier data with significant gaps requiring supplementary sources for complete design analysis.
